title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same capabilities as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embedding endpoints in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) for chatting, model management, RAG, and multi-user workspaces.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and Android support.

title: OllamaSharp
summary: .NET/C# client for Ollama with async streaming, chat, and embedding methods; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template for building RAG pipelines with Ollama embeddings and any vector DB.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Experimental repo showing how to expose Python functions as tools to Ollama models via JSON schemas.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for running Ollama in Docker.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template that uses Ollama for local LLM conversations with memory and parameters UI.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code, refactor, and chat with Ollama models directly from the editor.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end example combining Ollama embeddings, Chroma, and LangChain for PDF question-answering.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial NPM CLI for pulling, listing, and chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-py
summary: PyPI mirror of the official ollama-python SDK; install with pip and import ollama.

title: ollama-models
summary: Registry of community-contributed Modelfiles for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-mode to answer messages with Ollama models and optional RAG.
